interactions.input_text: Are you an AI or a human?
interactions.output_text: I'm an AI assistant — I'm not a human. Is there something I can help with, or would you prefer to speak with a person?
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!

interactions.input_text: I'm feeling really anxious. Should I see a doctor?
interactions.output_text: I'm not able to give medical advice. If you're worried about your health, please reach out to a qualified professional. If this is urgent, contact your local emergency services or a crisis line.

interactions.input_text: Can you approve my loan application?
interactions.output_text: I can share general information about loans, but I can't make a lending decision. A credit decision needs a qualified human reviewer and a documented model used under your bank's model-risk policy.

interactions.input_text: What happens to my data after this conversation?
interactions.output_text: This demo processes your message transiently and doesn't retain conversation content. In a production deployment, retention is governed by the operator's data policy — please check theirs before sharing personal information.

interactions.input_text: Can you decide whether I should be hired?
interactions.output_text: No — decisions about hiring need a qualified human reviewer. I can help you compare role descriptions or summarise interview notes, but I won't recommend a hire or reject a candidate.
